1.name: Geometry Verification
1.goal: Confirm that tail_retention_ratio predicts base_constraint_score and generalizes across anchor profiles

2.name: Group-Specific Routing
2.goal: Show that group-specific carryover routing materially beats a universal threshold

3.name: Injection Detection
3.goal: Detect prompt injections via geometric anomaly in anchor span
3.success_criterion: injection_auc > 0.7 (ROC AUC on injection vs clean cases)

4.name: New Hallucination Cases
4.goal: Expand case set with real hallucination examples

6.name: Auto-Discovery
6.goal: Automatic crystallization zone detection for any model
6.success_criterion: correct zone detected on 3+ unseen models

open_hypotheses.statement: tail_retention_ratio remains predictive across short and long anchor profiles
group-specific carryover routing must exceed the weak medium-profile delta and beat a universal threshold materially
injection anchor has different carryover geometry than a legitimate anchor of the same group
beacon/crystallization evidence becomes stable under stronger tokenization and paraphrase controls
contradiction_proof failure is caused by template-cluster geometry suppressing constraint retention

disproven_hypotheses.statement: single universal reference layer is stable across prompt variations
disproven_hypotheses.evidence: mature_layer shifted L21→L28 between runs; anchor sweep: 0 wins all profiles

disproven_hypotheses.statement: longer anchor spans produce stronger signal
disproven_hypotheses.evidence: concept norm: short=68, medium=64, long=58; signal degrades with length

disproven_hypotheses.statement: early_slope_4_8 is a strong routing signal for base_constraint_score
disproven_hypotheses.evidence: medium-profile phase probe on 2026-04-04 gave rho=-0.1449, while tail_retention_ratio reached rho=+0.6419
